notes: Dual-view layout matches the input photo's two squid orientations and the overall mantle/arm silhouette is recognisable, but the rendering reads as noisy photo-trace clutter rather than restrained FAO linework.
specific_issues: broken/jittery silhouette with stray fragments along mantle and arm edges
arms fused into clumped blobs without distinct ringed suckers
stipple scattered randomly rather than concentrated in chromatophore fields
tentacular clubs not articulated as separate elongated structures
top view eye missing; bottom eye is just a small dot with no almond contour
fin outline broken and ragged rather than a clean continuous curve
many short disconnected line fragments from edge-detection artifacts
no single-weight confident contour — every line is a wobbly trace
